name: KnotStyle
summary: Knot styles for NURBS curves and surfaces. If a knot vector meets the conditions of two styles, then the style with the lowest value is used.

enum_values.name: PiecewiseBezier
enum_values.summary: All internal knots have full multiplicity.

enum_values.name: ClampedEnd
enum_values.summary: Clamped end knots (with at least one interior non-uniform knot).

enum_values.name: NonUniform
enum_values.summary: Known to be none of the other styles
